hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /home/user/ConceptSailing && if ! npm run build 2>&1; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"npm run build failed — fix build errors before committing"}}'; exit 1; fi; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running npm run build before commit...

hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); is_deploy=0; is_prod=0; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git push'; then is_deploy=1; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'origin[[:space:]]+(main|master|production|prod)([[:space:]]|$)'; then is_prod=1; elif ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'origin[[:space:]]+\S'; then cur=$(git -C /home/user/ConceptSailing branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); { [ "$cur" = "main" ] || [ "$cur" = "master" ] || [ "$cur" = "production" ]; } && is_prod=1; fi; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^vercel(\s|$)|^vercel deploy'; then is_deploy=1; echo "$cmd" | grep -q -- '--prod' && is_prod=1; fi; [ $is_deploy -eq 0 ] && exit 0; [ $is_prod -eq 1 ] && exit 0; cd /home/user/ConceptSailing && if ! npm test 2>&1; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Tests failed — fix before deploying to non-production environments"}}'; exit 1; fi
